/ Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order To File A First Amended Answer
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS JUSTINE HIGUERAS and MATTHEW CURTIS's Motion For An Order To File A First Amended Answer.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' "motion for an order to file a first amended answer" is granted; no timely opposition filed.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
